summary: Payroll Batch Governance Testing Complete - Fixed critical route ordering bug in backend. All batch APIs working: Preview, Create Batch, Get Batches, Get Batch Details, Edit Record (DRAFT only), Confirm Batch, Mark Paid. Frontend UI verified with all components working correctly.

fixed.issue: Route ordering bug - /hr/payroll/{payroll_id} was matching before /hr/payroll/batches causing 404 errors
fixed.fix: Moved batch routes before the generic {payroll_id} route in server.py

passed_tests: CEO login (ceo@wisedrive.com / password123)
Navigate to HR Module → Payroll tab
Payroll Batches view with filters (Country, Year, Status)
Generate Payroll button opens modal with Country, Month, Year selects
Preview Payroll API works - returns employee grid with deduction columns
Preview screen shows columns: Employee, Gross, PF, PT, TDS, ESI, Attendance, Other, Net Salary
Create Batch button visible on preview screen
Batch list shows Period, Country, Employees, Total Gross, Total Net, Status, Generated, Actions
View Details button opens batch detail view
Batch detail shows status badge (DRAFT/CONFIRMED/CLOSED)
Batch detail shows summary cards (Gross, Deductions, Net)
Batch detail shows employee records grid
CLOSED batch: No Edit button (records immutable)
CLOSED batch: No Confirm Batch button
CLOSED batch: Shows '✓ Paid' status on records
API: POST /api/hr/payroll/preview - 200 OK
API: POST /api/hr/payroll/batch - 200 OK (creates DRAFT batch)
API: GET /api/hr/payroll/batches - 200 OK (with filters)
API: GET /api/hr/payroll/batch/{id} - 200 OK (returns batch + records)
API: PUT /api/hr/payroll/batch/{id}/record/{id} - 200 OK (edit in DRAFT)
API: POST /api/hr/payroll/batch/{id}/confirm - 200 OK (DRAFT → CONFIRMED)
API: POST /api/hr/payroll/batch/{id}/mark-paid - 200 OK (CONFIRMED → CLOSED)
API: Immutability enforced - cannot edit CONFIRMED batch records
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in FastAPI is critical - specific routes must be defined before generic path parameter routes
Employees have salary = 0 because salary structures are not set up - this is expected per context
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed route ordering for payroll batch endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created test batch for March 2026 India via automated tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payroll batch governance model fully implemented and tested. Workflow: Generate Modal → Preview → Create Batch (DRAFT) → Edit Records → Confirm (CONFIRMED) → Mark Paid (CLOSED). Route ordering bug was fixed - batch routes must be before {payroll_id} route. Employees show salary=0 because salary structures aren't configured.

payroll_batch_workflow.preview: WORKING - POST /api/hr/payroll/preview returns employee grid with deductions
payroll_batch_workflow.immutability: WORKING - Cannot edit CONFIRMED/CLOSED batch records

frontend_ui.batches_list: WORKING - Table with Period, Country, Employees, Gross, Net, Status, Actions
frontend_ui.generate_modal: WORKING - Country, Month, Year selects with Preview Payroll button
frontend_ui.preview_screen: WORKING - Employee grid with Gross, PF, PT, TDS, ESI, Attendance, Other, Net columns
frontend_ui.batch_detail: WORKING - Status badge, summary cards, employee records grid
frontend_ui.action_buttons: WORKING - Edit (DRAFT), Confirm Batch (DRAFT), Mark as Paid (CONFIRMED)

bug_fix_details.issue: FastAPI route ordering bug - /hr/payroll/{payroll_id} was matching /hr/payroll/batches
bug_fix_details.root_cause: In FastAPI, routes are matched in order of definition. The generic {payroll_id} route was defined before the specific /batches route
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Moved /hr/payroll/batches and /hr/payroll/batch/{batch_id} routes BEFORE /hr/payroll/{payroll_id} in server.py
